name: Fate
tagline: Bend luck, fortune, and alignment-charged power to your will.

baseAbility.name: Word / Consecration
baseAbility.description: Word: standard action, touch, 1 SP. Place a temporary effect ('word') on a target based on a (word) talent you know; lasts while you concentrate, or 1 min/CL for 1 more SP. Consecration: standard action, self-centered 20-ft. aura that moves with you. You start with Serendipity, granting allies in the aura a +1 luck bonus to attacks, skill/ability checks, and saves.

talents.name: Align Object (word)
talents.description: New word: imbue a weapon or object with an alignment-based property relevant to your Fate magic.

talents.name: Classify (word)
talents.description: New word: compel a target to truthfully identify themselves.

talents.name: Geas (word)
talents.description: New word: a long-duration compulsion forcing a target to complete a task, similar to the geas spell.

talents.name: Hallow (word)
talents.description: New word: grant protections against your opposed alignment to the area or target.

talents.name: Truth (word)
talents.description: New word: prevent the target from speaking deliberate lies for the duration.

talents.name: Perfect (word)
talents.description: New word: boost one of the target's ability scores along with a themed side benefit.

talents.name: Greater Serendipity
talents.description: Your Serendipity consecration also curses enemies in the area with a matching penalty.

talents.name: Mass Words
talents.description: Apply the same word to 1 extra target per 2 CL (min 1) at once.

talents.name: Instill Motif or Word
talents.description: Bottle a word or motif effect into a liquid usable later like a potion.

talents.name: Additional Consecration (consecration)
talents.description: Learn another consecration effect you can raise instead of (or alongside) Serendipity.
